description_long: This is a small, elongated crustacean with a segmented, slightly arched body and a hard exoskeleton. Its coloration is predominantly brown with subtle gradations, and it features two long, slender antennae extending from the head. The body is divided into a broad, rounded cephalothorax and a tapering abdomen, with multiple pairs of thin, jointed legs extending from the underside. The tail end is pointed and features several fine appendages. The surface appears rough and matte, with visible segmentation and fine textural details. No prominent claws are visible, and the eyes are small and positioned on the sides of the head.
description: A small, brown, segmented crustacean with long antennae, many legs, and a rough, matte exoskeleton.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, segmented body, long antennae, and multiple legs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded back, tail appendages, and the spread of the legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with antennae and legs visible along the body.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the broad cephalothorax, segmentation, and symmetrical leg arrangement.
